---
name: Feature request
about: Propose new behavior for the resolver
title: "<short description of the proposal>"
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What's missing or awkward today, and why it matters.

## Proposed approach

What you'd like to see — architectural shape preferred over exact
implementation details (see [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](../../docs/ARCHITECTURE.md)
for the existing ports/adapters/orchestrator layers this should fit into).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why this one seems better.

## Notes

Is this a change to **ribosome** (this repo, the resolver) or to the
**standard** (`ribosome.json`/`ribosome.lock.json` themselves)? Standard
changes belong in
[ribosome-schema](https://github.com/medullaflow/ribosome-schema) instead.
